allowed: verify required environment secret presence without exposing values
validate response JSON against declared contracts
verify response freshness against dispatch source and slice facts
evaluate declared policies and gates without product-specific branching
invoke declared provider workers through bounded dispatch contracts
return provider-attributed candidate output and metadata
forbidden: promote strategy, test, implementation, or product truth
use stale or mock provider responses as cognitive evidence
emit durable policy, gate, SEJ, SOG, schema, or SDK authority
write run artifacts from provider primitives unless declared by a separate materialization operation

consumerNextStepAfterPublish.expectedMovement: from cognitive_provider_runtime_support_missing to live provider invocation or candidate hardening

completionPosture: The resolver may add only generic language/host-power operations needed to execute declared cognitive provider lanes. It must not implement platform-agent policy, strategy promotion, or product behavior.
